title: SEC Meeting With Equity Group
description: SEC Meeting With Equity Group L-R,  Managing Director, Strategy Equiti Group Ltd Mr Gaurang Desai,  CEO  Equiti Group Ltd Mr  Mohamed Alahmad and Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr
html:
SEC Meeting With Equity Group

L-R,  Managing Director, Strategy Equiti Group Ltd Mr Gaurang Desai,  CEO  Equiti Group Ltd Mr  Mohamed Alahmad and Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Lamido Yuguda during a Meeting between The SEC and  Equiti Group Ltd in Abuja
